title: zollernia surinamensis
intro: Zollernia surinamensis, also known as Guarea, is a plant species that belongs to the Meliaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Zollernia surinamensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Zollernia surinamensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
